titleStmt.title: SII 40.135: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 135. (A.R. No. B. 269 of 1931.) Tirupati, Peddapuram Taluk, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Śingāravallabhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1352, Sādhāraṇa, Mārgaśira, śu. 15, Wednesday, corresponding to 1430 A.D., November 30.

Register the gift of a flower-garden to the temple by a certain Mēḷḷūri Talli-Śeṭṭi of Penugoṇḍa for the merit of his parents Talli-Śeṭṭi and Gaṅgama Śeṭṭisāni and of his other ancestors. The donor belonged to the Balliseṭla-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1352
Agunēṁṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara mā
rgaśira śu 15 budhavārāna ballise
ṭla gōtramu penugoṁḍa puṇyaṁ
ṁḍaina mēḷlūri talliseṭṭi koḍu
ku talliseṭi tamataṁḍri talliseṭṭi
kinni tama talli gaṁgamaseṭṭi sā
nikinni tama pitṛ pitāmaha pra
pitāmahulukunnu tama gotraṁ
vārikini sukrutamugānu

śriṁgārarāyanki peṭṭiṁccina
śrī bruṁdāvanaṁ tōṁṭa paṭṭu
na 3 nnu Ā śrī briṁdāvanaṁ seśi dā
sari kṣētraṁmuna 10 nnu vana 13 ku kā
tōcina mūlyamu ṭa 10 samarpiṁ
cci Ācaṁdrārkamugānu śrībriṁ
dāvanamu peṭṭiṁccenu yi dharma
mu śriṁgārarāyaṁḍu Ācaṁ
drārkkamugānu Avadariṁciri maṁ
gaḷamahā śrīśrīṁ jēyun .
Digital edition of SII 40.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
